message:
fix(runtime): add missing CONFIG GET handlers for buffer limit params

- Add CONFIG GET handlers for client-query-buffer-limit, proto-max-bulk-len,
  and client-output-buffer-limit (previously CONFIG SET worked but CONFIG GET
  returned empty for these parameters)
- Add all three to the static param skip list to prevent duplicates
- Fix proto-max-bulk-len default: 512000000 (Redis's exact default) instead
  of 536870912 (512 MiB)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
